---
title: "Welcome to My Analytics Lab"
---

Hello! My name is Burcu Altundağ Eroğlu.

Welcome to my personal webpage. I am an Industrial Engineer and a master's student at Hacettepe University, with interests in data analytics, optimization, and decision science.

This website is a place where I share my academic work, projects, and coursework.

Feel free to explore my publications, projects, and assignments. More content will be added as I continue learning and working in the field of data analytics.
